ontology_hints: Observation – the act of gathering information from the documentation.
Constraint – a rule that may require documentation review before proceeding.
Logistic Process – a step within a maintenance workflow.
Workstation – the physical area where the documentation is accessed.
Situation – the contextual state in which the documentation is relevant.
